body.title: Implement D233 spreading activation
body.result: Implemented D233 spreading activation. cortex.spreading_activation(seed_nodes, depth=2) → dict[node_id, float] with two-layer propagation: word-graph layer (hop_decay=0.6) via wg_edges + bridge to memories via wg_word_docs, and memory-graph layer (hop_decay=0.8) via parent/children/links. Added WordGraph.spread_from_words() and WordGraph.words_to_doc_ids() for the WG layer. 13 tests, all passing. Commit 2445e49c.
body.description: Implement cortex.spreading_activation(seed_nodes, depth=2) → dict[node_id, float]. Two-layer heat propagation: (1) word-graph layer — hop_decay=0.6, depth=2, feeds predict_next; (2) memory/interpretive layer — hop_decay=0.8, depth=2, feeds cortex.search. Seeds = TWM top-7 (Miller's Law). Bridge: hot word nodes activate memories via content index. Multi-source sum activations. Foundation for prediction error, inhibition, and binding tickets. Ref: D233.
